description: The Element fragrance for men from hugo boss has hints of citrus, wood and spices, and is perfect for a romantic occasion. The element opens with fresh, aquatic top notes that meld with a heart of ginger and coriander. A cedar wood base brings the essence full circle.Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
